data.title: HPUC approves new rates for Hawaii American Water in Hawaii Kai, Mauna Lani, and Waimea due to $40 million in upgrades.
data.description: The Hawaii Public Utilities Commission (HPUC) has recently authorized revised wastewater rates for Hawaii American Water’s service areas in Hawaii Kai, Mauna Lani, and Waimea. Hawaii American Water submitted its rate proposal on August 5, 2024, citing the need for enhancements to the local infrastructure amounting to over $40 million across the three regions. These adjusted rates reflect the company's dedication to upgrading outdated infrastructure, ensuring the provision of secure and dependable services, and adhering to environmental mandates.

data.title: WeRide gets permit in Shanghai to operate Level 4 Robotaxi service with Chery, revolutionizing urban mobility.
data.description: A permit has been awarded to WeRide by the Shanghai municipal government, allowing them to offer Level 4 autonomous Robotaxi ride-hailing services in Pudong, Shanghai.

data.title: Analyst warns $9B XRP in Chris Larsen's wallet may increase selling pressure beyond recent 50B XRP sale.
data.description: The selling pressure on XRP may significantly increase following a recent sale of 50 billion XRP from a wallet reportedly associated with Ripple's Chris Larsen, indicating that this sale could be just the beginning.

data.title: Article on America's rise under President Trump: Focus on $3.1 Billion renovation project, 250,000 MLK Jr. documents, declassified 2020 House Intelligence Committee report. Claim of Russian interference in 2016 election by Obama officials. For full story, visit Benzinga.com.
data.description: ThinkCareBelieve's article, published on July 26, 2025, discusses America's rise under President Trump's leadership. The article covers POTUS's visit to the Federal Reserve and the $3.1 billion renovation project. Focus areas include winning the AI race, achieving American energy dominance, and the White House Action Plan. President Trump emphasized reclaiming America's heritage as a nation of builders. Additionally, 250,000 MLK Jr. documents were made public at the National Archives, and DNI Tulsi Gabbard declassified the 2020 House Intelligence Committee report that alleged Obama administration officials manipulated intelligence to suggest Russian interference in the 2016 election helped Trump win. Gabbard stressed the importance of truth for the American people. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Data breach at Tea app reveals photos and IDs of women sharing red flags about men. App users' personal info compromised.
data.description: A recent data breach has compromised the personal information, including photos and ID cards, of numerous women who registered on a popular app designed for women to exchange information about potential male partners. The breach has exposed sensitive data of a significant number of users, highlighting the security risks associated with such platforms.

data.title: Ethereum ETFs surpassed Bitcoin ETFs, attracting $1.8B in ETH while BTC funds lagged behind. ETH demand surges.
data.description: This week, Ethereum exchange-traded funds (ETFs) outperformed Bitcoin ETFs by attracting $1.8 billion in ETH investments, while Bitcoin funds received only a small portion of this amount.

data.title: Learn key strategies for developing secure and scalable MCP servers. Discover OAuth 2.1, AI gateways, and best practices.
data.description: Discover how to create dependable and expandable remote Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers that prioritize security. Explore implementing strong authorization and security features, including OAuth 2.1 integration and AI gateways to enhance protection. Uncover best practices for ensuring the safety and efficiency of MCP servers. Dive deeper into incorporating these measures to safeguard against security breaches and unauthorized access. Learn more about securing remote MCP servers to protect sensitive data and maintain operational integrity.

data.title: GitHub improves code viewing by ensuring consistent user-defined tab-width settings, enhancing developer experience. Check it out!
data.description: GitHub recently announced enhancements to the consistency of user-defined tab-width settings for viewing code on its platform. This update aims to improve the developer experience for users and ensure a more streamlined viewing experience. This change provides users with greater control over the display of code, contributing to a more user-friendly interface. Developers can now easily customize their tab-width settings to suit their preferences, thereby increasing the platform's flexibility. The update has been well-received, with a significant number of users benefiting from the enhanced functionality. Overall, this improvement underscores GitHub's commitment to optimizing the coding experience and meeting the evolving needs of its user base.

data.title: TWOPAGES releases 2025 curtain trend guide in Spokane, revealing new home interior aesthetics.
data.description: In Spokane, Washington, on July 26, 2025, TWOPAGES Curtains, a leading custom window treatment company, announced the release of its 2025 Second-Half Curtain Trend Guide. The guide highlights significant changes in consumer preferences and the increasing influence of digital culture on the industry.

data.title: Rising wrench attacks on crypto leaders are increasing trust in centralized custody for investors.
data.description: Attacks involving wrenches against well-known cryptocurrency executives are influencing the discussion around centralized cryptocurrency storage.

data.title: PONY AI Inc. gets permit for fully driverless commercial Robotaxi services in Shanghai's Pudong New Area - a milestone for the company.
data.description: Pony AI Inc. (Nasdaq: PONY), a prominent player in autonomous mobility, revealed its latest milestone on July 26, 2025, in Shanghai, China. The company secured a permit to operate fully driverless commercial Robotaxi services in the bustling Pudong New Area. This significant approval was granted during the World Artificial Intelligence Conference 2025. The permit showcases a growing trust from regulators in Pony.ai's technology and safety protocols. Moreover, it marks a crucial step forward in the advancement of Robotaxi commercialization within a key urban market in China.

data.title: Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene invested in Berkshire Hathaway at April lows, but her shares have not seen a sustained rally.
data.description: Representative Marjorie Taylor Greene (R-Ga.) has emerged as a prominent figure in stock investing among politicians, with much of her trading activities drawing widespread attention. Recently, she diversified her investment portfolio by acquiring stocks of various large-cap companies, including Berkshire Hathaway Inc. Class B (NYSE: BRK). On April 4, Greene purchased Berkshire Hathaway Class B shares, valued between $1,001 and $15,000. Her decision to buy during a market decline triggered by President Donald Trump's tariff policies proved strategic, as the stock had dropped by over 8% in the preceding two days. However, her hopes for a swift rally in the stock's value following her purchase did not materialize as expected. More detailed information can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: DoorDash leads 5 stocks near buy points, including Argan and Constellation Energy with AI data center exposure.
data.description: On Friday, DoorDash's stock showed a strong upward momentum. Additionally, two companies, Argan and Constellation Energy, are involved in AI data centers. These companies have exposure to this sector. DoorDash, along with four other stocks, are currently nearing buy points, as reported in an article about AI data center investments from Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Japan's sluggish approval processes hinder crypto adoption; WeFi CEO Maksym Sakharov says it drives Web3 startups abroad.
data.description: The CEO of WeFi, Maksym Sakharov, has pointed out that Japan's sluggish and cautious approval process, rather than taxes, is the main obstacle pushing Web3 startups and liquidity to other countries.

data.title: Pony AI Inc. receives permit for fully driverless commercial Robotaxi services in Shanghai's Pudong New Area at WAIC 2025.
data.description: Pony AI Inc., a prominent player in the field of autonomous mobility, has recently disclosed that it has secured permission to offer fully driverless commercial Robotaxi services in Shanghai’s Pudong New Area. The permit, obtained during the World Artificial Intelligence Conference ("WAIC") 2025, underscores the growing regulatory confidence in the Company's technology and safety protocols. This development marks a significant step forward in the progression of Robotaxi commercialization within a premier urban landscape in China. Pony.ai operates under the ticker symbol "PONY" on the Nasdaq and is recognized for spearheading the widespread adoption of autonomous mobility solutions.

data.title: Leprino, known as the cheese visionary, passed away at 87. He transformed a grocery store into a cheese empire, supplying major pizza chains like Domino’s, Papa John's, and Pizza Hut.
data.description: He transformed a modest family-owned grocery shop into a major mozzarella business, supplying the majority of cheese for popular American pizza brands such as Domino’s, Papa John’s, and Pizza Hut.

data.title: "Biden administration investigates custom pricing tailored to individual customers, prompting companies to adjust strategies."
data.description: The Biden administration has raised concerns about "surveillance pricing," a practice where companies tailor prices based on an individual customer's likelihood to pay. This has sparked increased interest from businesses to potentially adopt this strategy more confidently.

data.title: Amid uncertainty, investors have limited alternatives to U.S. Treasuries. Will joint European debt offer a solution?
data.description: As questions arise about the stability of the United States due to President Trump's turbulent economic policies, attention has been focused on a proposal for European countries to issue shared debt.

data.title: Potential $1M Bitcoin could revolutionize finance, reshaping wealth, inflation, energy markets, and fiat currency's role.
data.description: If Bitcoin were to reach a value of $1 million, it would have a profound impact on global finance. This surge in value would significantly alter wealth distribution, inflation rates, energy markets, and challenge the role of traditional fiat currencies.
